mechanics.excerpt: averaging 1.7 meters tall and often weighing no more than 50 kilograms_ Efforts increase perceptive ability and reaction times have had the side effect of enlarged craniums and eyes, giving pilots very distinctive appearance that sometimes caus es them t0 be shunned if they wash out of training; where they work most often in the scientist or technician castes The primary advantages pilots receive are modified Attribute thresholds in the Life Path (STR -1= BOD -1 DEX +2 RFL +21 and modified Attribute maximums as noted on the Attribute Maximums Table 56).
